testcase.name: test_ceremony_video_endpoint_returns_available_false
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ceremony_video_trailer.py:43: in test_ceremony_video_endpoint_returns_available_false assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generate_ceremony_video_requires_all_announced
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ceremony_video_trailer.py:62: in test_generate_ceremony_video_requires_all_announced assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 404], f"Unexpected status {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 in [200, 400, 404] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ceremony_video_download_requires_existing_video
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ceremony_video_trailer.py:91: in test_ceremony_video_download_requires_existing_video assert response.status_code in [200, 404], f"Unexpected status {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 in [200, 404] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_trailer_download_nonexistent_film_returns_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ceremony_video_trailer.py:131: in test_trailer_download_nonexistent_film_returns_404 assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for non-existent film, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent film, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_health_endpoint_responds

failure.message: AssertionError: Health check failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ceremony_video_trailer.py:212: in test_health_endpoint_responds assert response.status_code == 200, f"Health check failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Health check failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_festival_detail_golden

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to get golden festival: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ceremony_video_trailer.py:245: in test_get_festival_detail_golden assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get golden festival: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Failed to get golden festival: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
